features.label: Features
features.title: Everything for Fast Chibi Creation
features.subtitle: Generate cute chibi characters from prompts or reference photos, pick a style, preview the result, and download it instantly.
features.card1_desc: Describe hair, outfit, expression, pose, and background to create an original chibi anime character.
features.card2_desc: Upload a selfie, pet photo, or portrait and preserve recognizable details while transforming the image into chibi art.
features.card3_desc: Choose Classic Chibi, Kawaii Soft, Portrait Chibi, or Emoji Sticker depending on where you want to use the result.
features.card4_desc: Logged-in users can review recent generated images from the dashboard and keep track of monthly image credits.
features.card5_desc: Download completed images right away for avatars, stickers, fan art references, profiles, and personalized gifts.
features.card6_desc: Anonymous daily limits and account monthly credits protect the service while keeping the core tool easy to try.
